chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1226 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.3209/2023 (S/A) 2. For hearing of CMA No.3143/2023 (C/A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.3144/2023 (151 CPC) 15.06.2023 M/s Mehfooz Ahmed Awan and Farhan Ali Shaikh, Advocates along with petitioner Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Abdul Ghafoor Dhamrah, Deputy Director, ACE, Sukkur and Shah Nawaz, Circle Officer, ACE Khairpur >>>>>>>>..<<<<<<< Mr. Mehfooz Ahmed Awan, learned counsel for the petitioner has put on record certain documents under a statement, simultaneously, Circle Officer, ACE Khairpur put on record a statement along with certain documents. Both are taken on record. We have noticed that there appears no reason that this case is pending in this Court. The issue appears to be that petitioner, namely, Sardar Bux Mirani was a Food Inspector, he is accused of embezzling wheat grain, in this connection the Anti-Corruption Establishment has initiated Enquiry against him. The Enquiry has been assigned to Shah Nawaz Rahpoto, Circle Officer, Anti-Corruption Establishment, Khairpur. However, the petitioner, namely, Sardar Bux Mirani has leveled allegations against the Enquiry Officer. Prima-facie, the allegations appeared to be of no weight. The petitioner is directed to go and appear before the Enquiry Officer on 21.06.2023 at 11:00 am and answer all the questions of the Enquiry Officer as put to him. Page 2 of 2 Mr. Mehfooz Ahmed Awan, at this juncture interjects and submits that the petitioner has already filed a statement.

Page 2 of 2 Mr. Mehfooz Ahmed Awan, at this juncture interjects and submits that the petitioner has already filed a statement. Be that as it may, as it is a huge amount of Wheat which has been embezzled, the Enquiry Officer has to be satisfied. The petitioner Sardar Bux Mirani has filed a statement previously, he shall take that statement along with him to the Enquiry Officer. The Enquiry Officer shall put in writing that he has received a statement and that the petitioner, Sardar Bux Mirani has fully cooperated with him in the Enquiry. In the event, the Enquiry Officer reports to this Court that the petitioner has not cooperated, appropriate proceedings will be initiated against the petitioner Sardar Bux Mirani. The Enquiry shall be conducted under the supervision of Director Investigation, E&ACE, Karachi. The listed applications stand disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI
